pluses: Fire-hardy — Durin's folk burn far briefer than other peoples (the flame that felled dragons scarcely marks them)
Stone-hardy — endures wounds as no other kindred can (toughest of all peoples, ~13 hearts)
Unmovable as the roots of the mountains
Delver born — tears through stone with ease
Deep-Delver — hastens and hardens in the deep places, out of the sky's sight
Unbowed by the Shadow — the most resistant of all peoples to curse and corruption; poisons and hexes fade swiftly
Hardy of body — endures hunger and toil far past other folk
